notes: Wave 1 position paper filed at docs/adr/positions/council-quartermaster.md. Shortlist (11 direct deps): rusqlite (bundled), clap, ignore, crossterm, ratatui, nucleo-matcher, serde + serde_json, toml, anyhow, thiserror, tracing + tracing-subscriber, signal-hook. Swaps: fuzzy-matcher -> nucleo-matcher; num_cpus -> std::thread::available_parallelism; directories -> dirs. Rejects (v1): tokio/async runtimes, notify, chrono, lazy_static/once_cell, embedded scripting (Lua/Rhai), reqwest, structopt, tui (archived). Gate-C interpretive liberty (stability-demonstrated vs strict 1.0+) flagged to commander. Standing concerns: licence sweep via cargo-deny, musl + rusqlite-bundled cross-compile smoke test, cargo audit in CI from Phase 4 preflight, MSRV pin at adoption, target <120 transitive crates. Items marked VERIFY in paper require live crates.io/GitHub checks that were not possible in this sandbox (no confirmed network egress).
